# netbox_tag (Data Source)

Fetches a tag from NetBox by name or slug.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `name` (String) The name of the tag to look up.
- `slug` (String) The slug of the tag to look up.

### Read-Only

- `color` (String) The color of the tag (hex format).
- `description` (String) Description of the tag.
- `id` (Number) The ID of the tag.
